panels.spec/vizConfig/spec/options/content: Control Plane Actions

panels.spec/description: Number of rows that were read from the cache, without needing to be fetched from storage.
Number of rows that were not present in the cache, and had to be fetched from storage.
Requests that Scylla tried to write but timed out. Timeouts are counted in the node that received the request (the coordinator), not at the replicas.
Requests that Scylla tried to read but timed out. Timeouts are counted in the node that received the request (the coordinator), not at the replicas.
The current number of opened connections
Rate of new HTTP connections creation. High number may indicate a problem
